name: Vertex Cloud Tax API
what_it_does: Vertex Cloud REST API for enterprise indirect tax management and compliance. Enables AI agents to calculate sales tax, VAT, and GST on transactions; retrieve tax rates; audit tax calculations; manage exemption certificates; and integrate Vertex tax data into ERP, billing, and ecommerce workflows. Vertex is a leading enterprise tax solution with deep ERP integrations.
use_cases: Calculating accurate tax rates on transactions from billing and order management agents
Auditing tax calculations and returns from tax compliance monitoring agents
Managing tax exemption certificates from procurement and AP automation agents
Integrating Vertex tax data into ERP, SAP, and Oracle financial workflow agents
not_for: Simple US-only tax needs (consider TaxJar or Avalara for SMB)
best_when: A large enterprise with complex multi-jurisdiction tax requirements using Vertex wants AI agents to automate tax calculation, manage exemptions, and integrate tax compliance into ERP workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Tax calculation errors cause compliance violations and potential penalties. Incorrect tax data in financial systems requires complex corrections.

auth.notes: Vertex Cloud API uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials grant. Client ID and secret from Vertex developer portal. Enterprise account required.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise indirect tax platform pricing based on transaction volume
pricing.notes: Enterprise tax compliance platform. Significant investment for large organizations. Contact Vertex sales for pricing.

performance.rate_limits: High throughput for real-time tax calculation; rate limits per client

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Tax calculation errors lead to tax compliance violations — validate against known test cases
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Vertex is optimized for real-time calculation — low latency important for checkout integration
Exemption certificate management is separate API workflow from tax calculation
Deep SAP and Oracle ERP integration available through pre-built connectors — often preferable to custom API
99.99% uptime SLA makes Vertex suitable for real-time checkout tax calculation
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Tax compliance data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 client credentials. 99.99% uptime SLA. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Tax compliance data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 client credentials. Very high availability SLA.
